label: Postcapillary venules
evidence: The atlas (Gopee et al., 2024) identifies 'Postcapillary venules' as a fine-grained endothelial cell annotation in prenatal skin. These cells lie on the venular differentiation pathway from early endothelial cells, marked by PLVAP expression (Fig. 4d, Extended Data Fig. 10a-c). He et al. (2022) identified postcapillary venule endothelial cells (PCV cluster) in adult skin, marked by ACKR1, ICAM1, and SELP.
